review_title: ABA Desk for a small/medium company
description: ABA desk allows us to use online data collection systems and still manage to salary all of our direct care staff (this wouldn’t be possible with a system that costs as much as the others) which gives us much more flexibility and ability to serve our clients!
author: Samantha P.
pros: ABA desk is super affordable which is huge when you’re working on a tight fixed budget of health insurance reimbursement! The team is responsive to needs and fixes when they’re needed and it’s a pretty intuitive system.
cons: We’d love some more flexibility in the ability to collect different types of data and some more control over pulling data for the company as a whole and/or site specific.

review_title: My review is driven by data
description: At our company the ABA department has historically not been profitable due to the different authorization and billing methods we use compared to our company's other specialties (OT, PT, speech). ABA Desk is costing us less than half of what Catalyst was costing for better performance, the only thing we gave up when switching was cumulative graphs for programs that measure goal mastery criteria by the number of individual targets mastered.
author: Laura C.
pros: It is intuitive and easy to use. I LOVE how easy it is to get to any target I need without changing the page I'm on. The customer service has been phenomenal--I daresay ABA Desk is the Chick Fil A of ABA software. The price point is reasonable. It is so easy to add new programs when genius strikes in the moment.
cons: It is challenging that I cannot access an individual session note for printing, as my clients have MANY session notes and when we have documentation audits from insurance we only need one or two dates of service printed out. I wish I could have programs where the number of targets mastered was graphed cumulatively, rather than as % success for each individual target.
author_profession: ABA coordinator, Board Certified Behavior Analyst

description: I had a pretty positive experience with ABAdesk.
author: Kaitlyn J.
pros: I enjoyed the simplicity of the software and how easy it was to train new staff on it.
cons: I felt like the notes were difficult to manage because we had to manually search each day and time.

description: Every single time I needed help, the staff was prompt personal and professional. I would love to see the software grow and further develop to hit more complex practice needs. However, I'll take the superior customer service and stress free interface any day of the week.
author: Rachel O.
pros: As a practitioner with ADHD, the interface is soothing to my eyes. It's clean, not busy. The background color is not too bright. The simplicity of the programming and goal tracking set up is synthesized to the point it takes me a fraction of the time it took me to do the same tasks in Central Reach.
cons: I need NEED need the option to graph performance with different practitioners as different lines on the same graph. I would also love to be able to graph rate of mands on the same graph I graph rate of maladaptive behavior. The ability to overlay graphs and have different trend lines is essential for my practice as I put a heavy emphasis on generalization phases and replacement behavior growth.

review_title: ABA Desk: A New and Upcoming Data Software
description: I overall have had a positive experience with ABA desk! I love the functions it provides such as the supervisor questions, ensuring honest service times, the treatment report options, and how user friendly it is!
author: Nikki P.
pros: ABA desk is user friendly and the customer service is phenomenal. [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] is always willing to help!
cons: I am excited for ABA desk to become more established (e.g. their new app coming soon) as well as an increase in functions (e.g. ABC data, removing the delete all button without a warning message, trend lines, averages of data, split data by therapist, notes being the newest at the top and oldest at the bottom).

review_title: One of the Premier Data Capture Services out there!
description: Fantastic support, aid and minimal technical errors that occur on my end.
author: Elias F.
pros: Ease of use and the automated treatment plan function.
cons: More customizing freedom when it comes to developing goals within the program would be great. Its already awesome though!

author: Darcy C.
pros: I own a very small ABA practice and [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] has been so helpful getting my clients set up and quickly answering any questions I have.
cons: There are some functions that you have to find work arounds but they should be fixed with version 2.0.

description: The overall experience was great for my job!
author: Rory S.
pros: I enjoy the ease of use and user friendly interface. The set up on the phone was perfect. The website was fast and interactive mix and easy to communicate with supervisors.
cons: The session notes were a little all over the place, and the way you collect data wasn’t always easy, making you add more trials than necessary. The formatting was awful on the computer.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Stacia L. E.
pros: I am pleased with the software by ABADesk. I continue to learn and implement different features outlined on the software. I feel valued as a professional and the software is very cost effective for small business owners.
cons: At this time, I do not have any items that I consider a con.

author: Cheyanne F.
pros: Very user-friendly, nice graphics, perfect for multiple members on one case
cons: Wish there was a way to see the running percentage of trials for the session, would also be nice if the intervals didn't time out if you click off of it

description: I use this daily and love the program.
author: Brandi D.
pros: I love that data collection is so easy and I can pull it up at any time. I am able to access the graphed information and plan new goals much easier.
cons: I could not copy and paste existing goals into the system, but once the origional goals are in...you are good to go when revising.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It eliminates tons of paperwork and storage of raw data. For a small ABA agency, it works really well for collecting data, reviewing data, and making treatment changes
author: Rachel R.
pros: The data collection in real time is good, it is easy for my therapists to use effectively.
cons: I don’t like that there isn’t an automatic prompt fade feature, because I have to go onto every program daily and update the prompt levels
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Yenil L.
pros: It is very user friendly and it facilitates the data taking process
cons: Connection error can happen often in difficult areas.

author: Brandi C.
pros: Data collection accuracy, template building features, ease of navigation
cons: I did not like that session notes could not be entered out of consecutive order. For example, if a session note was not entered on June 1, it could not be entered on June 8 if other sessions had been entered since then. To get around this obstacle, you have to create a missing session note using a false date, submit it, then open it back up to edit it to the correct date.

review_title: What a great and secure ABA data collection software
author: Annie E.
pros: I think what I like most about ABA desk is that it was created by a BCBA for BCBA work. It is able to provide all of the varying types of data collection that are essential for my therapeutic services
cons: At this time, there is nothing missing from the software.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: As a user, I was able to easily train & begin using ABADesk immediately.
author: Chrysteil H.
pros: Super user friendly! I can take exactly the type of data my supervisor needs, because it's programed in It keeps track as I go The graphs are automatic & easy to access The graphs are so helpful for the clients/parents to follow
cons: The sessions must be entered in chronological order

review_title: Great data management software with top notch customer support
author: Barbara G.
pros: Setting up data collection needs is a snap. I'm not completely tech illiterate, but I've used other systems before and have had to refer to help guides repeatedly in the past. ABAdesk is simple enough that it's possible to get things ready to go after a demo session. Even better, if there are questions, [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] is available and incredibly helpful in making sure that things get fixed and resolved.
cons: The software does everything that it claims to do, and more!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I have loved using this software. The [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] has been so helpful in navigating how to use this and I will never go back to paper.
author: Cyndy R.
pros: I love that I was able to go completely electronic with this app! I literally use zero paper anymore and I used to have so many files worth of paper that I hate it to waste.
cons: There's nothing that I just like about this software.

description: I really like how quickly I can input data. This is a great product!
author: Sarah A.
pros: I like how easy it is to maneuver. It stores all my notes which can easily be accessed at any time.
cons: I hope that when putting in the date perimeters, it can stop saying “invalid date/time” multiple times.

description: I am not happy with this data program.
author: Bonny B.
pros: I do not like anything about ABA Desk. It's very basic. Your better off doing paper and pencil data at this point.
cons: Too basic, you cannot customize graphs and barely customize the programs.

author: Sarah R.
pros: ABA Desk is so easy to use! You can customize programs, store programs in a program bank, and have staff collect data in real time. The website saves itself often so you never have to worry about losing the data. My staff love how easy it is navigate and collect data.
cons: It doesn't sync up with billing softwares. There's only one signature box. It is not good for having multiple session notes (bt vs bcba).
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: April O.
pros: User friendly, easy to navigate, lots of options for programming
cons: It is difficult to make date data if a user forgot to submit their note

review_title: ABAdesk is easy to use and visually appealing
author: Sophia G.
pros: I appreciate the colored icons and list format.
cons: It frequently closes and clears all my data.

description: It’s great to look at the statistics and look back on session notes
author: Emily K.
pros: It’s very helpful that everything is calculated for you in percentages so it’s easy to transfer data
cons: Loss of data occasionally when using a tablet
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Olivia M.
pros: The ability to quickly capture data electronically is essential in a job like this. ABADesk easily organized and summarized my data for me. Love the graphing ability of the software.
cons: Wish there was an app instead of saving the webpage to home screen on devices. Also wish you could type in a number for frequency count instead of pushing the button however many times- really tedious with high frequency behaviors. Glitches detracted from my overall experience- notes not saving right or disappearing, local save glitches, etc.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
